message:
feat(module-resolver): add structured JSONL trace records for resolution outcomes and errors

Add ModuleResolutionTraceRecord with versioned schema
(rgc.module-resolution.trace.v1) so both successful resolutions and
resolution errors emit a uniform trace record suitable for JSONL
evidence streams. Enrich ResolutionError with request_specifier,
canonical_specifier, source_kind, and probe_sequence fields so every
error path carries full diagnostic context. Update all error return
sites in DeterministicModuleResolver to attach resolution attempt
metadata via with_resolution_attempt(). Add integration test
validating the JSONL trace contract round-trip for allow and deny
outcomes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
